name: set_workflow_target_path
description: Set the workflow target path — the specific subdirectory within the session root that this workflow focuses on. Must be a subpath under the session's root path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The workflow target path to set. Must be a directory and a subpath of the session's session_root_path.

returns: Confirmation of the workflow target path, or an error if the path is invalid.
